one_time_description: Prior period adjustment for HST penalties and interest owing from years prior to 2021 recorded as adjustment to opening accumulated surplus
economic_notes: First Nation operates Tim Hortons and Esso business operations. Has investments in Shwe Miikaan Corp (33.333% ownership) and Shwe Miikaan Limited Partnership (33.333% ownership). Two inactive consolidated entities: Magnetawan Development GP Inc. and Magnetawan Development Limited Partnership.
notes: HST liability of $7,192,903 included in accounts payable for HST collected but not remitted on fuel sales to non-status individuals and commercial contractor. Penalties and interest of $359,864 in current year plus $525,010 prior period adjustment. 2021 comparative figures restated (note 24). Previous year audited by a different firm. Social Assistance expense mapped to expenses_social; Community Infrastructure/Public Works mapped to expenses_infrastructure; Band Support mapped to expenses_administration; Business Operations Tim Hortons and Esso combined for expenses_enterprises. Expenses total per statement is $21,330 (thousands implied but shown as $21,330 in document — likely $21,330,000 based on context of other line items adding to ~$18.3M subtotal plus deferred contributions end of year).
